chapter_title.en: Chapter on What is Permitted to Be Slaughtered in the Sanctuary and Taken Outside

text: 2383 - وَ سُئِلَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : عَنْ رَجُلٍ أَدْخَلَ فَهْدَهُ إِلَى اَلْحَرَمِ أَ لَهُ أَنْ يُخْرِجَهُ فَقَالَ «هُوَ سَبُعٌ فَكُلُّ مَا أَدْخَلْتَ مِنَ اَلسَّبُعِ اَلْحَرَمَ أَسِيراً فَلَكَ أَنْ تُخْرِجَهُ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2383 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) was asked about a man who brought his cheetah into the sacred sanctuary (Al-Haram). Is he allowed to take it out?
Imam (as) replied: "It is a predator. Whatever predator you bring into the sanctuary as a captive, you are allowed to take it out."
